posts.author: MoorvaleEvents
posts.text: Big news! The annual Westbridge Garden Show is taking place this Saturday in the main park. There will be live music, local craft stalls, and a huge display of rare roses. Free entry for all residents! Come along if you can. #GardenShow #Westbridge #Community
posts.explanation: This is a harmless public event announcement with no policy violations.
posts.bio: Fictional events, culture and local announcements.
